YOLOX (Megvii) is vendored at external/YOLOX/.

Install (recommended):
  cd experiments/yolo/external/YOLOX
  python3 -m pip install -e .

Dependencies include: torch, pycocotools, loguru, tabulate (see YOLOX/requirements.txt).

Without pip install -e, `import yolox.tools.train` will fail; the setuptools layout maps `yolox.tools` to the `tools/` directory.

Val mAP uses pycocotools COCOeval by default (no JIT). For the faster C++ COCOeval,
install a toolchain (`apt install build-essential`) and set:
  export YOLOX_USE_FAST_COCO_EVAL=1
See yolox/evaluators/coco_evaluator.py.
